# [PKT-PRV-005](task-0072): Service Seam

## Purpose

Create optional service seam.

## Scope

- Seam interface
- Implementation
- Configuration

## Implementation

1. Define interface
2. Implement seam
3. Add config

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Interface defined
2. Seam works
3. Configurable
